text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #4)
> Thanks for the hint. I'm away from the Toshiba computers for a few days, out of town.
> Aiming to review this report in around a week.

Hi Graham,
Have you had a chance to look into this yet to see if your wireless devices are correctly shown in "sysctl net.wlan.devices"?
Thanks,
Ben
